title: TrackedManeuver schema
description: TrackedManoeuvre entity coming from Tracked (Operation Tracking System). Tracked maneuver. The entityId follows the pattern mrn:urn:eshuv:pdph:Tracked:type:attr:value, where type=Manoeuvre and attr=manoeuvreCode

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be TrackedManoeuvre

observedDate.description: Property. Last update date of the entity

refPortCallId.description: Property. Reference to the port call

refTugServiceId.description: Property. Reference to the tug service

portCallCode.description: Property. STM register of the port call

mooringFirstCableDate.description: Property. First line time for the mooring maneuver

mooringLocation.description: Property. Location of the mooring maneuver

mooringCablesNumber.description: Property. Number of lines for the mooring maneuver

mooringSide.description: Property. Mooring side for the mooring maneuver

mooringChangeLastCableDate.description: Property. Last line time for the berth-shifting maneuver

mooringChangeInitialLocation.description: Property. Initial location of the berth-shifting maneuver

mooringChangeFirstLandCableDate.description: Property. First shore line time for the berth-shifting maneuver

mooringChangeLastLocation.description: Property. Final location of the berth-shifting maneuver

mooringChangeCablesNumber.description: Property. Number of lines for the berth-shifting maneuver

mooringChangeSide.description: Property. Mooring side for the berth-shifting maneuver

undockingLastCableDate.description: Property. Last line time for the unmooring (undocking) maneuver

undockingLocation.description: Property. Location of the unmooring (undocking) maneuver

amendedOnMooringLocation.description: Property. Location of the 'made fast alongside / amended on mooring' maneuver

anchoringZone.description: Property. Anchorage zone for the anchoring maneuver

anchoringDate.description: Property. Anchor down time for the anchoring maneuver

anchoringAnchorUpDate.description: Property. Anchor aweigh (anchor up) time for the anchoring maneuver

othersZone.description: Property. Zone/location of the other maneuver

pilotageEmbarkLocation.description: Property. Pilot embarkation location for the pilotage maneuver

pilotageEmbarkDate.description: Property. Pilot embarkation time for the pilotage maneuver

pilotageDisembarkLocation.description: Property. Pilot disembarkation location for the pilotage maneuver

pilotageDisembarkDate.description: Property. Pilot disembarkation time for the pilotage maneuver

pilotagePilots.description: Property. Pilots involved in the pilotage maneuver

tugboatsNumber.description: Property. Number of tugboats for the tug service maneuver
